_instructions.usage: Fill in every field below with real project data, then seed it with: npx tsx scripts/seed-from-json.ts path/to/this-file.json
rules: Do NOT remove any key — if unknown, leave as null or empty string.
Leave image/document storage_url and url as empty string '' — add via admin Media panel

project.name: IITL Nimbus The Hyde Park
project.address: Plot No. GH-03, Sector 78, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201304
project.tagline: The Crown Jewel of Lifestyle and Connectivity
project.description: IITL Nimbus The Hyde Park is a highly secure, completed residential development in Sector 78, Noida, featuring biometric/RFID access systems and beautiful themed gardens.
project.long_description: IITL Nimbus The Hyde Park is a premier, ready-to-move-in residential complex situated in the prime core of Sector 78, Noida. Spanning over 15 sprawling acres, this highly secure community houses 2,092 units across 10 towers rising G+21 and G+25 levels. Developed via a robust joint venture between IITL Projects Ltd and the Nimbus Group, the project stands out for structural execution and seamless, delay-free handovers. The development is equipped with smart infrastructure systems, including automated RFID vehicular entry, biometric secure lobbies, high-speed OTIS elevators, and premium plumbing fixtures from Roca. Residents enjoy extensive amenities, including a massive central clubhouse with an infinity pool and themed manicured lawns, all while being situated a mere 300 meters from the Sector 50 Aqua Line Metro Station.
project.design_theme: Modern Classic European Estates with Themed Courtyards
marketing_claims: RFID-based Automated Gate Entries and App-Based Upkeep
75% Open Greens with Multi-Tier Manicured Gardens
Premium Roca Sanitary Fittings and Otis/Kone Elevators
Active and Fully Operational Resident Welfare Association (RWA)
project.project_risk_flag: None: Fully delivered, highly occupied, stable joint-venture finance, and active flat registries.

builder.name: Nimbus Projects Ltd
builder.company_overview: Nimbus Projects Ltd (originally incorporated in 1993) is a prominent, publicly traded real estate enterprise in NCR. In collaboration with Industrial Investment Trust Limited (IITL), they have delivered exceptional joint-venture structures across Noida, including Hyde Park, Express Park View, and Palm Village. Celebrated for high corporate governance and timely delivery, they hold an exemplary legal track record.

Mod kitchens with polished granite tops

connectivity.name: Noida Sector 50 Metro Station (Aqua Line)
connectivity.notes: Seamless 3-minute walk to the metro terminal

connectivity.name: FNG Expressway Corridor
connectivity.notes: Direct access to Faridabad and Ghaziabad bypass

assumptions: All pricing estimates map directly to historical ready-to-move transaction averages.
GST is 0% because the society has received full Occupancy Certificate (OC).
Standard bank loans are readily available from SBI, HDFC, and ICICI.

payment_plan.notes: Supported by SBI and Axis Bank home loan portfolios.

decision_profile.decision_thesis: IITL Nimbus The Hyde Park represents an exceptionally safe, transit-oriented ready-to-move buy, boasting direct 300m walking proximity to the Sector 50 Metro Station.
why_buy: Peerless Metro Connectivity: Just 300m from the Aqua Line platform, making commuting stress-free.
Advanced Security Systems: RFID vehicular barriers and biometric towers prevent illegal common-area entry.
Flawless Legal Status: Fully delivered with 100% active registries and zero title blocks.
why_avoid: High Dense Complex: Over 2,000 units spread across the complex results in a high-density, lively feel.
Moderate Premium Pricing: Proximity to the metro station has priced-in major capital values.
decision_profile.best_for: Working families, senior citizens prioritizing clean walking links, and tech professionals commuting to Noida/Greater Noida.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: Buyers looking for very quiet, low-density, exclusive boutique residences.

buyerPersonas.headline: No-Car Daily Commutes
reasons: Direct 300m path to the metro platform saves fuel and driving stress.
Excellent secure gate entries for late-night returns.

riskRadar.description: 100% complete and fully occupied. Zero construction risk.
Complete legal approvals, CC/OC received, and active registrations.

transparency_checks.label: Registry Active
transparency_checks.details: Registries actively executed without dues blocks.

investment_insights.appreciation_desc: Consistent price increases due to prime central location and metro access.
investment_insights.rental_desc: Highly sought-after by IT professionals, commanding strong monthly rentals.
investment_insights.market_desc: Robust demand for completed, registry-cleared complexes next to metro nodes.
investment_insights.liquidity_desc: Prime location ensures high liquidity; exit options can close in 30 days.

neighborhood_advantages.title: Prime Transit Pocket
neighborhood_advantages.description: Highly developed road and metro node in central Noida.

persona_descriptions.FAMILY: Working families seeking standard-size apartments with excellent secure gate entries and absolute transit ease.
persona_descriptions.INVESTOR: Yield-seeking investors aiming for stable, secure rental yields from highly liquid metro-adjacent properties.

persona_profile.risk_appetite: Conservative — wants completely secure, RTM assets
persona_profile.work_location: Noida/Greater Noida Expressway or Sector 62 IT corridor
persona_profile.motivation_note: Unmatched daily convenience of stepping out directly onto the metro link and complete legal title security.

recommendation_profile.primary_thesis: IITL Nimbus The Hyde Park represents one of the safest and most practical ready-to-move investments in Sector 78. Its incredible metro location and clean legal standing make it a highly resilient asset.
recommendation_profile.end_use_thesis: Outstanding for end-users requiring daily commuting. The biometric security and automated gates ensure peace of mind.
recommendation_profile.investment_thesis: An exceptional defensive asset. High renter demand secures yields of 4%+, and values appreciate steadily.
recommendation_profile.family_thesis: Vastu-compliant layouts, beautiful manicured parks, and excellent local schools within walk limits make it highly family friendly.
recommendation_profile.investor_thesis: Recommended for stable income generation. Metro-adjacent assets never go out of style or rent demand.
recommendation_profile.luxury_thesis: Elegant European estate theme, Roca fittings, and polished Otis lifts offer high-grade comfortable living.
recommendation_profile.risk_thesis: Zero delivery risk. Complete legal titles, active registries, and robust Joint Venture funding.
walk_away_conditions: Strict preference for ultra-exclusive low-density structures.
negotiation_leverage: Pit multiple ready sellers against each other due to the size of the society.
Squeeze prices on non-park facing units.
recommendation_profile.timeline_advice: Perfect ready status. Act now if a registered unit is available below ₹12,000/sqft.
recommendation_profile.admin_notes: Highly clean joint venture ledger with Noida Authority.

competitors.this_project_advantage: Closer to the Sector 50 Metro Station (300m vs 500m); lower average unit pricing standard.
competitors.competitor_advantage: Moderne Verona offers more upscale architecture (Hafeez Contractor) and larger layout profiles.
competitors.verdict: Choose Nimbus for daily transit ease and entry-level value; choose Mahagun for architectural prestige and larger multi-generation homes.
competitors.price_delta_note: Nimbus is approx. Rs 500/sqft cheaper than Mahagun Moderne.

images.caption: Manicured European Gardens of Nimbus Hyde Park
